caption.full:
Odelya Halevi is expecting her first child, a baby girl.

The Law & Order actress announced she is pregnant with her first child, due in December 2026. Halevi discovered the pregnancy the day after wrapping season 25 of the hit series.

What’s the first thing you’d gift this baby girl — something pink or a mini detective kit?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#TVNews #LawAndOrder #OdelyaHalevi #BabyNews
caption.firstComment: This little detective will need serious patience — she’s already stolen the show’s chocolate stash before season 26 even starts.

youtube.description:
Odelya Halevi announced she is pregnant with her first child, a baby girl due in December 2026. The Law & Order actress discovered the pregnancy the day after wrapping season 25. Halevi shared she felt her baby kick for the first time just a few days ago.
